statement: In every magma, Equation 544 (`x = y * (z * (x * (y * w)))`) implies Equation 2279 (`x = (x * (y * (z * y))) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0896
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op x (op y w))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x (op y (op z y))) z)
